note: seq=82: NON-Socrata source diversification -- deploy GLEIF (LEI) + IRS-990 EO-BMF collectors (both free, no-auth, firmographic, genuinely non-Socrata). HONEST FINDING: GLEIF/CKAN/IRS-990 had NO collector scripts (never built; 'landing 0' = nonexistent), so this BUILDS them. GLEIF pulls US legal entities from api.gleif.org (JSON:API, source_record_id=LEI), IRS streams eo1-4.csv regional Business Master Files (source_record_id=EIN; records are nonprofits, host is irs.gov but no .gov business domain). Both idempotent (SR_EXISTS + ON CONFLICT), bounded per run (GLEIF 8k/run, IRS 60k/run), cursor-persisted, reuse the proven socrata_import insert helpers, fail-soft, and SELF-REPORT to status/hetzner/{gleif,irs990}.json with fetched/inserted/error -> 'live' ONLY with real rows. Daily timers + immediate --no-block first run (IRS downloads large CSVs so it cannot run inline). If the box egress blocks either endpoint, the status JSON says blocked+reason (honest, not silent). CKAN + SoS debug to follow once these two prove the non-Socrata path lands rows.

steps.note: seq=82: GLEIF + IRS-990 EO-BMF collectors (non-Socrata diversification), self-reporting real rows.

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; w={'/opt/atlas/importers/atlas_gleif_import.py':'9d212a492d5524c0f44fed705529bc1a197ef3ef9820a19273fe821a250d84c7','/opt/atlas/importers/atlas_irs990_import.py':'0a50950756f0d586e5ea7908015e37a3fa1650724437f59fb4fca6a8e666dbfe'}; [sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+p) for p,h in w.items() if hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest()!=h]; print('collector shas ok')"

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=ATLAS GLEIF LEI collector
After=network-online.target postgresql.service
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=oneshot
Nice=15
IOSchedulingClass=idle
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/db.env
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/audit.env
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/importers/atlas_gleif_import.py
TimeoutStartSec=600

[Unit]
Description=ATLAS GLEIF daily

[Timer]
OnCalendar=*-*-* 05:20:00
Persistent=true
RandomizedDelaySec=600

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target

[Unit]
Description=ATLAS IRS-990 EO-BMF collector
After=network-online.target postgresql.service
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=oneshot
Nice=15
IOSchedulingClass=idle
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/db.env
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/audit.env
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/importers/atlas_irs990_import.py
TimeoutStartSec=1800

[Unit]
Description=ATLAS IRS-990 daily

[Timer]
OnCalendar=*-*-* 05:40:00
Persistent=true
RandomizedDelaySec=600

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import os,subprocess as s; keys=['STATUS_TOKEN','STATUS_REPO','STATUS_API_BASE','STATUS_BRANCH','NODE_ID']; open('/etc/atlas/audit.env','w').write(chr(10).join('%s=%s'%(k,os.environ[k]) for k in keys if os.environ.get(k))+chr(10)); os.chmod('/etc/atlas/audit.env',0o600); s.run(['systemctl','daemon-reload']); [ (s.run(['systemctl','enable',u]), s.run(['systemctl','start',u])) for u in ['atlas-gleif.timer','atlas-irs990.timer'] ]; [ s.run(['systemctl','reset-failed',v]) for v in ['atlas-gleif.service','atlas-irs990.service'] ]; s.run(['systemctl','start','--no-block','atlas-gleif.service']); s.run(['systemctl','start','--no-block','atlas-irs990.service']); print('gleif + irs990 collectors kicked')"
